name: LoveIwara
desc: Love Iwara (i-iwara or 2i). An unofficial iwara flutter app - Supporting multiple platforms and devices including mobile phones, tablets and computers. Compati…
descFull: Love Iwara (i-iwara or 2i). An unofficial iwara flutter app - Supporting multiple platforms and devices including mobile phones, tablets and computers. Compatible with Android, Windows and other systems. 第三方的Iwara应用 - 支持多个平台和设备，包括手机、平板和计算机。兼容 安卓、IOS、Windows、MacOS等系统。
